purpose: Measure the production (Opus) auditor's false-negative rate against planted, code-verified ground truth.
auditor_isolation: Auditor working set = /tmp/r51_cal/fixtures + /tmp/r51_cal/rubric.md + /tmp/magpie_develop_ro (code). NO access to magpie-agent/audit, git, current docs, or this key. Verified post-hoc via agent tool-call transcripts.

fixtures.code_truth: TRUE: cropland(29) default IS detail_apr24 (default.cfg). True-twin of the croparea fixture, where detail_apr24 would be WRONG.

fixtures.wrong_claim: croparea(30) default realization is `detail_apr24`
fixtures.code_truth: croparea default is `simple_apr24` (default.cfg). detail_apr24 is the NON-default sibling. (vm_area(j,kcr,w) is correct in both.)

fixtures.wrong_claim: vm_manure_recycling comes 'From Module 50'
fixtures.code_truth: vm_manure_recycling is DECLARED in Module 55 (awms, ipcc2006_aug16/declarations.gms:21) and POPULATED there (equations.gms:84, LHS =e=). M50 only READS it (RHS). Source is 55, not 50.
fixtures.survival: present through R30-R39 all-module-doc push; caught R50

fixtures.wrong_claim: module 35 computes fire risk dynamically from climate (temp/precip) and biomass
fixtures.code_truth: M35 applies loss from FIXED INPUT shares f35_forest_lost_share + scenario shock f35_forest_shock, scaled by timestep (presolve.gms:14-32). No climate/biomass fire model; 'wildfire' is a loss LABEL (sets.gms:12). The p35_disturbance_loss_* params DO exist.

fixtures.bug_class: wrong module attribution for a cost variable
fixtures.wrong_claim: vm_cost_prod_crop is computed (owned) by Module 11 in q11_cost_reg
fixtures.code_truth: vm_cost_prod_crop is DECLARED+POPULATED in Module 38 (factor_costs, sticky_feb18 declarations.gms:16; q38_cost_prod_labor/capital equations.gms:15,21). M11 only CONSUMES it (q11_cost_reg sums it on RHS, 11_costs/default/equations.gms:15).

fixtures.wrong_claim: 40 of 46 modules have multiple realizations
fixtures.code_truth: 22 of 46 have multiple realizations (verified two ways: $include realization.gms count == subdir count excluding input/). The '40' counts each module's input/ DATA dir as a realization.
fixtures.citation: modules/*/module.gms; input/ is a data dir not a realization
fixtures.survival: ~19 rounds in AGENT.md/Core_Architecture before caught R49 (HIGH survival)

fixtures.code_truth: TRUE: som has exactly cellpool_jan23 (default) + static_jan19. Count and default both correct.

fixtures.wrong_claim: `s32_aff_plantation` defaults to 1 (afforestation grows as plantation)
fixtures.code_truth: s32_aff_plantation default = 0 (default.cfg). With the default, afforested land grows as natural vegetation, NOT plantation. (forestry default dynamic_may24 is correct.)

fixtures.wrong_claim: M52 computes the soilc emission and routes it to M56 (serial M52 -> M56)
fixtures.code_truth: For one-off (incl *_soilc) CO2, M56 reads vm_carbon_stock DIRECTLY in q56_emis_pricing_co2 (56/price_aug22/equations.gms:19-22), NOT M52 output. M56 reads vm_emissions_reg only for the DISJOINT emis_annual subset. M52 & M56 are PARALLEL readers.
fixtures.survival: answerer-confabulation class against a correct doc; reproduced R49

fixtures.bug_class: citation drift to materially different content
fixtures.wrong_claim: q10_land_area is located at landmatrix_dec18/equations.gms:20
fixtures.code_truth: q10_land_area is at equations.gms:13-15. Line 20 holds a DIFFERENT equation, q10_transition_to(j2,land_to). Equation name + formula are correct; only the line citation is drifted to materially different content.

fixtures.wrong_claim: land conversion costs (Module 29/30) use lagged pm_carbon_density
fixtures.code_truth: Land conversion costs are Module 39 (landconversion, calib), AREA-based (q39_cost_landcon / vm_cost_landcon, 39/calib/declarations.gms:13). M39 has ZERO carbon refs. 29/30 are not the conversion-cost modules.
fixtures.survival: present through R47 capstone audit of circular_dependency_resolution.md; caught R49

fixtures.code_truth: TRUE: q10_land_area is at equations.gms:13-15, formula and set-based structure correct. True-twin of the citation-drift fixture (which cites :20).

fixtures.wrong_claim: `vm_feed_intake_total(i)` is the regional feed-intake aggregate variable
fixtures.code_truth: vm_feed_intake_total does NOT exist (rg absent). Real var is vm_feed_intake(i,kap,kall) (70/fbask_jan16/declarations.gms:18). vm_dem_feed and q70_feed_intake DO exist.

fixtures.wrong_claim: v21_trade is a core/always-present optimization variable (no default caveat)
fixtures.code_truth: Default trade realization is selfsuff_reduced (default.cfg). v21_trade is declared ONLY in NON-default selfsuff_reduced_bilateral22. Default uses v21_excess_prod/v21_excess_dem/v21_import_for_feasibility.
fixtures.survival: present through R30/R48 audits of Data_Flow.md; caught R50

fixtures.code_truth: TRUE and correctly parameterization-aware. True-twin of the planted 'mechanistic fire model' fixture; tests over-correction.

fixtures.wrong_claim: livestock(70) default is `fbask_jan16_sticky`
fixtures.code_truth: Default is `fbask_jan16` (default.cfg). fbask_jan16_sticky is the NON-default alternative. (vm_dem_feed, vm_cost_prod_livst are correct.)

fixtures.wrong_claim: module 13 is a (default) consumer of pm_land_conservation
fixtures.code_truth: M13's read at endo_jan22/presolve.gms:40 is gated by if(c13_croparea_consv = 1, ...) (presolve.gms:38); default c13_croparea_consv = 0 (default.cfg:309). In a default run M13 does NOT consume pm_land_conservation. The 29/31/32/35 consumers are unconditional/correct.
fixtures.survival: caught R41 (Q5-B1); same class as the s42_pumping default-state anchor

fixtures.code_truth: TRUE: livestock default IS fbask_jan16; fbask_jan16_sticky is the non-default alt. True-twin of the wrong-default fixture.
fixtures.adjudication: ADJUDICATION: this CLEAN control contained an unintended error - the gloss "inertial feed-basket adjustment" is wrong; fbask_jan16_sticky differs by CAPITAL-STOCK inertia (realization.gms:8-10). Auditor CAUGHT it -> a true catch, NOT a false positive.

fixtures.wrong_claim: water_demand(42) default is `agr_sector_aug13`
fixtures.code_truth: Default is `all_sectors_aug13` (default.cfg), which covers agricultural AND non-agricultural (domestic/industry/electricity) water demand. agr_sector_aug13 is the NON-default. (vm_watdem is correct.)

fixtures.wrong_claim: no module reads vm_land at the solution level (.l/.lo)
fixtures.code_truth: FALSE: many modules read vm_land.l/.lo/.fx in presolve/postsolve -- 22 (presolve_ini), 31, 32, 34, 35, 59, plus 10 (start/postsolve). The claimed absence is wrong (solution-level grep blind spot).
fixtures.survival: caught R49 (msg-B1); the MANDATE-20 solution-level grep blind spot

fixtures.code_truth: TRUE: default IS all_sectors_aug13 (ag + non-ag); agr_sector_aug13 is the non-default. True-twin of the wrong-default fixture.

fixtures.wrong_claim: `s15_elastic_demand` defaults to 1 (food demand is price-elastic by default)
fixtures.code_truth: s15_elastic_demand default = 0 (default.cfg). Food demand is INELASTIC by default. (food default anthro_iso_jun22 is correct; intersolve loop exists.)

fixtures.wrong_claim: land-use intensity is the parameter `pm_tau` (held fixed)
fixtures.code_truth: It is the VARIABLE vm_tau(j,tautype) (13_tc/endo_jan22/declarations.gms:13) -- endogenous, SOLVED (default tc realization endo_jan22). pm_tau does not exist. Parameter-vs-variable prefix/scope is wrong.
TRUE: past default IS endo_jun13; static is the non-default alt.
fixtures.adjudication: ADJUDICATION: this CLEAN control was imprecise - endo_jun13 models pasture AREA+carbon, not "pasture management" (realization @limitations). Auditor caught it (Minor) -> true catch, NOT a false positive.

fixtures.wrong_claim: `s56_c_price_induced_aff` defaults to 0 (carbon price does NOT induce afforestation)
fixtures.code_truth: s56_c_price_induced_aff default = 1 (default.cfg) -- carbon-price-induced afforestation IS ON by default. Inverted boolean.

fixtures.wrong_claim: vm_tau is indexed (i,tautype) -- regional
fixtures.code_truth: vm_tau(j,tautype) -- indexed by CLUSTER j, not region i (13_tc/endo_jan22/declarations.gms:13 'tau at cluster level'). Wrong scope/dimension.
TRUE: s56_c_price_induced_aff default = 1 (ON). True-twin of the inverted-boolean fixture.

fixtures.wrong_claim: `q56_carbon_pricing` is the equation that prices CO2
fixtures.code_truth: q56_carbon_pricing does NOT exist. The real CO2 pricing chain is q56_emis_pricing_co2 -> ... -> q56_emission_costs -> vm_emission_costs (G2 chain). vm_emission_costs(i) does exist.

fixtures.wrong_claim: vm_area is indexed (j,kcr)
fixtures.code_truth: vm_area(j,kcr,w) -- also indexed by water-supply type w (rainfed/irrigated) (30/detail_apr24/declarations.gms:21, simple_apr24:18). Dimension truncated (omits w).
TRUE: vm_cost_prod_livst is declared in Module 70 (fbask_jan16/declarations.gms:12). Correct attribution.

fixtures.wrong_claim: `vm_soil_carbon(j)` is the soil organic carbon stock variable
fixtures.code_truth: vm_soil_carbon does NOT exist (rg absent). Soil organic carbon is tracked as the `soilc` pool slice within vm_carbon_stock (the c_pools dimension), not a standalone vm_soil_carbon variable.
fixtures.citation: rg 'vm_soil_carbon' modules/ -> absent; SOC is the soilc slice of vm_carbon_stock

fixtures.code_truth: TRUE: 52_carbon has exactly one realization, normal_dec17 (also the default). True-twin of the fabricated-realization fixture.

fixtures.bug_class: wrong module attribution for a cost variable
fixtures.wrong_claim: vm_tech_cost is computed (owned) by Module 11
fixtures.code_truth: vm_tech_cost is declared+populated in Module 13 (tc, endo_jan22/declarations.gms:10 'Total Annuitized costs of TC'). Module 11 only CONSUMES it. Wrong-module attribution for a cost variable.
TRUE: vm_tech_cost is declared in Module 13 (endo_jan22/declarations.gms:10). True-twin of the mis-attribution fixture.

fixtures.wrong_claim: 52_carbon has a `normal_apr22` realization (and it is the default)
fixtures.code_truth: 52_carbon has ONLY normal_dec17 (single realization, also the default). normal_apr22 does NOT exist (ls modules/52_carbon/).
TRUE: vm_cost_prod_crop declared+populated in Module 38 (sticky_feb18); M11 consumes it. True-twin of the wrong-owner fixture.

TRUE: vm_tau is a VARIABLE (not pm_tau), indexed (j,tautype) at cluster level, endogenous in endo_jan22. True-twin of BOTH the pm_tau prefix and the vm_tau(i,..) dimension fixtures; tests over-correction.
